message:
feat(harness): register sql_semantic_differential and tcl_conformance modules; tidy formatting

Add pub mod declarations for sql_semantic_differential and
tcl_conformance in fsqlite-harness, wiring up two new test harness
modules for SQL semantic differential testing and TCL conformance
validation. Also apply minor formatting cleanups: collapse multi-line
assert_eq! calls in db_fec tests and alphabetize parser imports to
match rustfmt conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
